name: pickle-rick
description: Pickle Rick v2 — multi-agent orchestrator with full lifecycle engine. Reads specs, decomposes into tickets, delegates to themed agents, monitors quality.

preToolUse.description: Guard file deletion based on autonomy mode

agentSpawn.description: Display roster or resume existing session with state

stop.description: Check for red flags in orchestrator response

welcomeMessage:
